title: [BH] Better Huds
description: adds new & useful huds to minecraft (Armor Hud, Potion Hud, etc...)
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e946188c5f7cb0c3a0422ac4e80b3304bd4374f6.png)



Better Huds is a modular Fabric HUD mod for Minecraft `1.16-1.16.5(Beta)` `1.21.x - 26.1.1` focused on clean overlays, fast customization, and profile sharing.

Requires [**Fabric API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

_1.16.x requires Java 17+_

## Highlights

- Drag-and-drop HUD editor with grid snap and resize
- Widget settings in a visual card grid
- Per-widget enable/disable, colors, text visibility, and scale
- Profile system with import/export
- Custom crosshair widget withthe ability to make **YOUR OWN**
- API so other mods can register their own widgets (hence the library tag)

## Included Widgets

- Armor
- Held item / hands
- Survival status
- Keystrokes
- Sprint status
- FPS
- Ping
- Coordinates
- Speed
- Clock
- Biome
- Direction/compass
- Crosshair
- Consumables
- Item history
- Item counter
- Status effects
- Mini inventory

## Customization

- Move widgets anywhere with anchor + snapping support
- Resize widgets from the editor
- Configure text and background styling per widget
- Keep UI clean with toggleable text/background options
- Manage global behavior from the global settings panel
